approvalSource: Steve said go after the revised Foundation control layer plan addressed metadata-only privacy proof, deterministic gate reliability injection, and proposed-only decision auto-emit apply mode.
notes: Approval covers only the remaining Foundation control layer bundle: gate reliability, personal workspace boundary, doctrine propagation v3, decision auto-emit v2, and CEO dashboard pattern doctrine. It does not approve Phase G Track 2, UI polish, Strategy, Scoper, Agent Factory, or corpus expansion.
